config/_default/config.toml:
baseURL = "http://localhost:1313/"
timeout = "45s"
defaultContentLanguage = "en"
defaultContentLanguageInSubdir = true

[module]
  [[module.imports]]
    path = "github.com/jpanther/congo/v2"

[outputs]
  home = ["HTML", "RSS", "JSON"]

[taxonomies]
  category = "categories"
  tag = "tags"
  series = "series"

[security]
  [security.exec]
    allow = ['^dart-sass-embedded$', '^sass$', '^go$', '^postcss$', '^node$', '^npm$']
  [security.funcs]
    getenv = ['^CODESPACE_NAME$', '^GITHUB_CODESPACES_PORT_FORWARDING_DOMAIN$']

[imaging]
  resizerFilter = "box"

[sitemap]
  changefreq = "weekly"
  priority = 0.5
  filename = "sitemap.xml"
config/_default/languages.toml:
[languages.en]
  languageName = "English"
  locale = "en-US"
  title = "Congo Enterprise Marketing Hub"
  weight = 1
  [languages.en.params]
    author = { name = "Marketing Hub" }
    header = { showLanguageChooser = true }
    color = "blue"
  [[languages.en.menu.main]]
    name = "Home"
    pageRef = "/"
    weight = 10
  [[languages.en.menu.main]]
    name = "Blog"
    pageRef = "/posts"
    weight = 20

config/_default/params.toml:
[params]
color = "blue"
font = "sans"
logo = "logo.png"
homepage = "posts"

[params.meta]
robots = "index, follow"

[params.social]
twitter = "marketing_hub"
github = "congo-hub"
linkedin = "company/marketing-hub"

[params.header]
showLanguageChooser = true
showSearch = true

[params.footer]
showCopyright = true
showPoweredBy = true
